scripts.sync:hrs: cp ../hydrogen/hrs-dash/deploy/index.html ./demos/hrs-dashboard.html && cp ../hydrogen/hrs-dash/deploy/pogok.html ./demos/pogok.html && if grep -q 'auth-gate.js' ./demos/hrs-dashboard.html ./demos/pogok.html; then echo 'ERROR: auth-gate leaked - is hrs-dash on public branch?' >&2; exit 1; fi && echo 'HRS demos synced OK (from hrs-dash public branch)'
